mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, merchant_id, menu_item_id, item_name, unit_price_cents, quantity, subtotal_cents, created_at) VALUES
(#{it.orderId}, #{it.merchantId}, #{it.menuItemId}, #{it.itemName}, #{it.unitPriceCents}, #{it.quantity}, #{it.subtotalCents}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT menu_item_id AS menuItemId, item_name AS itemName, unit_price_cents AS unitPriceCents, quantity, subtotal_cents AS subtotalCents FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
